meta.name: Tim Huynh
meta.title: Senior Software Engineer
meta.subtitle: Infra Automation & Dev Tools | Golang & Python | Internal Platforms
meta.heroDesc: Backend-focused Software Engineer with 7+ years building scalable systems, APIs, and developer platforms. Specialized in Golang, distributed systems, and automation — currently shaping CI/CD infrastructure at Target.
meta.contactDesc: Open to backend, platform engineering, and SRE roles. If you're working on distributed systems or developer tooling, I'd love to hear about it.

about.heading: Building systems that don't break at 3am.
paragraphs: I'm a Senior Software Engineer based in Maple Grove, MN, focused on backend development, infrastructure automation, and developer experience.
At Target, I contribute to Go-Vela — an open-source enterprise CI/CD platform — while embedding reliability, observability, and self-healing across Target's broader engineering ecosystem.
I hold a B.A. in Computer Science from the University of St. Thomas and bring hands-on experience from SRE, network engineering, and data platform roles.

experience.description: Develop and maintain Target's open-source CI/CD platform (Go-Vela) in Golang. Design scalable automation for build orchestration, artifact storage, and test reporting across distributed systems. Implement observability and self-healing mechanisms to ensure platform resilience and uptime.

Architected and deployed Apache Airflow clusters on Kubernetes, enabling self-service ETL orchestration. Implemented centralized logging and metrics pipelines with Prometheus and Grafana, enhancing workflow visibility.

Scaled a custom Network OS test suite from <50 to 500+ Golang and Python test cases — a 10x increase in coverage that accelerated regression cycles. Developed a robust Python integration layer with atomic rollback and idempotent operations, eliminating configuration drift across environments.

Engineered resilient systems supporting critical supply chain and merchandising operations at a Fortune 50 retailer. Automated incident triage and recovery workflows using Python. Defined SLOs and SLIs for production services and implemented self-healing mechanisms.
Planning, design, and implementation of key systems in a high-availability environment. Integrated system applications for end users, monitored performance, and participated in 24x7 on-call support.

projects.title: Fitness Intelligence Agent
projects.description: A multi-phase agentic AI system using LangChain and a self-hosted Ollama instance (llama3.1:8b) for natural-language coaching over personal fitness data. Features a two-track RAG architecture — SQLite-backed verified summaries for numerical queries and ChromaDB vector store for narrative retrieval — with a hallucination guard layer validating outputs against source data.
projects.description2: Full SRE monitoring stack deployed on a self-hosted Linux server: Prometheus, Grafana, Node Exporter, NVIDIA GPU Exporter, and Alertmanager with systemd-automated LLM query scheduling.

projects.title: Domain Knowledge Graph System
projects.description: A generic self-organizing knowledge system using domain graph architecture on top of a self-hosted Ollama instance. Extends RAG patterns toward domain-agnostic applications including codebases and operational runbooks.
